test_output_summary: 49 tests passed in 0.35s. All goal_reader tests pass. 1 pre-existing failure in test_errors.py (CollectionExistsError added by chromadb_indexer task, test not updated) is unrelated to this task.
implementation_notes: Implemented ingestion/goal_reader.py with two public functions: read_source_documents() and resolve_source_files(). The module parses the Source Documents markdown table from GOAL.md using regex-based section extraction and table parsing, then resolves glob patterns against the sources/ directory. Security measures include path traversal detection via regex and realpath-based prefix checking. All functions use the existing error hierarchy (DomainNotFoundError, GoalValidationError) from ingestion/errors.py and the SourceDocument stub model from ingestion/models.py. Updated ingestion/__init__.py to export both functions.
concerns: Pre-existing test failure in ingestion/tests/test_errors.py::TestInheritanceChain::test_all_five_error_classes_exist due to CollectionExistsError being added by another task without updating the test expectation. Not caused by this task.
requirements_addressed: AC-001: read_source_documents() parses Source Documents from GOAL.md
AC-002: resolve_source_files() expands glob patterns against sources/ directory
AC-003: Missing domain directory raises DomainNotFoundError
AC-005: Malformed Source Documents section raises GoalValidationError
AC-006: No matching files raises GoalValidationError with descriptive message
AC-007: Path traversal patterns rejected with error logged
AC-008: Resolved files are returned as (absolute_path, mode) tuples
AC-009: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors

completion_promises.evidence: Implemented read_source_documents() in ingestion/goal_reader.py. It reads GOAL.md from the domain directory, extracts the '## Source Documents' section via regex, and parses the markdown table into a list of SourceDocument (Pydantic) instances. Tested with 4 tests in TestReadSourceDocuments covering valid parsing, correct patterns, modes, notes, and single-document edge case.

Implemented resolve_source_files() using pathlib.Path.glob() to expand each SourceDocument's file_pattern against domain_path/sources/. Tested with tests: test_expands_glob_patterns, test_unmatched_files_excluded, test_multiple_patterns_resolved, test_deduplicates_across_patterns, test_exact_filename_pattern.

read_source_documents() checks domain_path.is_dir() and raises DomainNotFoundError with descriptive message. Tested with test_missing_domain_raises_domain_not_found_error and test_domain_not_found_is_ingestion_error.
read_source_documents() checks goal_path.is_file() and raises GoalValidationError with message 'GOAL.md not found in domain directory'. Tested with test_missing_goal_md_raises_goal_validation_error.

Three failure modes raise GoalValidationError: (1) missing '## Source Documents' heading, (2) empty section body, (3) missing required columns (File Pattern, Mode). Tested with test_malformed_source_docs_raises_goal_validation_error, test_malformed_table_raises_goal_validation_error, test_empty_goal_md_raises_error, plus internal parser tests for empty, header-only, and wrong-column tables.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] No matching files raises `GoalValidationError` with descriptive message
completion_promises.evidence: resolve_source_files() raises GoalValidationError when the resolved list is empty, including the patterns that were attempted and the sources directory path. Tested with test_no_matching_files_raises_error (checks 'No source files found'), test_no_match_error_includes_patterns, and test_missing_sources_dir_raises_error.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Path traversal patterns (e.g., `../`, `..\\`) in filenames are rejected with error logged
completion_promises.evidence: Three layers of path traversal protection: (1) _has_path_traversal() regex rejects patterns containing '../' or '..\\', (2) filename traversal check on matched files, (3) os.path.realpath() prefix check ensures resolved files are within sources/. All rejections are logged at ERROR level. Tested with test_path_traversal_pattern_rejected and test_path_traversal_backslash_rejected (both verify caplog contains 'path traversal'), plus test_path_traversal_in_filename_rejected.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Resolved files are returned as (absolute_path, mode) tuples
completion_promises.evidence: resolve_source_files() returns list[tuple[Path, str]] where each Path is absolute (via Path.resolve()) and mode is the string from the SourceDocument. Tested with test_returns_absolute_path_tuples (asserts is_absolute() and isinstance checks), test_mode_matches_source_document, and test_resolved_paths_exist.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' on all 3 modified/created files (ingestion/goal_reader.py, ingestion/tests/test_goal_reader.py, ingestion/__init__.py). All checks passed with zero errors and zero format violations.
